results.title: County Debates Data Center Moratorium
results.description: At Tuesday’s regular meeting, the Yankton County Commission heard an overflow room of people debate both sides of a proposed temporary moratorium on data centers.

results.title: Sullivan, Quinn face runoff in Oklahoma’s insurance commissioner contest
results.description: OKLAHOMA CITY — Oklahoma’s crowded Republican race for insurance commissioner is headed to a runoff after no candidate received the majority of the votes. Bob Sullivan will face Marty Quinn during the Aug. 25 primary runoff ballot. Sullivan won about 37% of the vote while Quinn received about 27%....
